ordering_rules: Entries are sorted by path ascending.
This inventory captures visible semantic/domain surfaces without resolving final semantic ownership.
Duplicate-shadow and low-confidence roots remain visible for later Λ-series and Ρ-2 work.

entries.name: astronomy domain
entries.notes: Contains ephemeris, illumination, and orbit-view logic.

entries.name: chemistry domain
entries.notes: Contains process-run and degradation surfaces.

entries.name: diegetics domain
entries.notes: Observed as a small but live semantic root.

entries.name: electric domain
entries.notes: Contains power network, fault, protection, and storage logic.

entries.name: embodiment domain
entries.notes: Contains body, collision, lens, movement, and tools-related logic.

entries.name: epistemics domain
entries.notes: Observed through memory-kernel style implementation.

entries.name: field root
entries.notes: Needs later reconciliation with fields/**.

entries.name: fields root
entries.notes: Needs later reconciliation with field/**.

entries.name: game baseline content
entries.notes: Contains astro, cosmo, and mechanics toml content for the live game root.

entries.name: geometric world domain
entries.notes: Large domain root spanning frames, metrics, overlays, pathing, render, and worldgen-related logic.

entries.name: infrastructure domain
entries.notes: Observed through formalization and inference-oriented files.

entries.name: logic domain
entries.notes: Contains compile, eval, network, noise, protocol, signal, and timing subdomains.

entries.name: machine domain
entries.notes: Small but live machine-domain root.

entries.name: materials domain
entries.notes: Large semantic root with construction, composition, materialization, performance, and provenance subdomains.

entries.name: mobility domain
entries.notes: Contains geometry, network, signals, traffic, travel, and vehicle subdomains.

entries.name: domain packs
entries.notes: Contains astronomy, earth, and navigation-related pack content.

entries.name: experience packs
entries.notes: Contains experience profiles, scenarios, and UI window declarations.

entries.name: law packs
entries.notes: Semantic surface where law/profile content is expressed through packs rather than only code.

entries.name: physics domain
entries.notes: Observed through momentum, energy, and entropy surfaces.

entries.name: pollution domain
entries.notes: Contains compliance, dispersion, exposure, and measurement logic.

entries.name: reality domain
entries.notes: High-signal root directly relevant to later semantic/reality doctrine work.

entries.name: signals domain
entries.notes: Contains addressing, aggregation, institutions, transport, and trust subdomains.

entries.name: system domain
entries.notes: Contains certification, forensics, reliability, statevec, templates, and validation surfaces.

entries.name: universe domain
entries.notes: Observed through universe identity builder and contract enforcer files.

entries.name: world generation
entries.notes: Large live root spanning core solvers, earth, galaxy, milky-way, and refinement surfaces.
